creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Ranma Saotome, 18.10.08, 09:43h CEST:

> tingo tried to make a port, but there are some issues with the
> installation script that will hopefully be fixed in next tarball.
> 
> See http://forum.amule.org/index.php?topic=15684.0 for more informations.

OK. Can we agree that this PR can be closed and a new one should be sent
once there's a patch to update amule to a new version?

Regards,
Stefan
